title: Betalicious
description: Use old Beta textures in new builds, by turning blocks into their old versions using the Time Machine.
body:
### Use old textures in new builds!
Betalicious is a mod for **Minecraft 1.21.1 NeoForge and Fabric** that adds **over 50 blocks from old versions of Minecraft** so that you can use old textures in new builds!

You can obtain them by using a handheld **Time Machine** on certain blocks to convert them to their Beta versions.

To begin, craft a Time Machine using an ender eye and 4 iron ingots:
![The crafting recipe for the Time Machine item, consisting of one Ender Eye in the center surrounded by 4 iron ingots in the cardinal directions.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/54ee3a2369af1666f97747f2d2ffbc0d218b5865_0.webp)

The blocks behave almost identical to their modern counterparts so that the only major difference is the texture.

The mod also features a few blocks with unique effects.


**Requires [Architectury API](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api).**

Suggest additions on the [Discord server](https://discord.gg/abWNXyudA5), also check out [the wiki](https://github.com/Sparkwave2/betalicious/wiki) for more info!
